benefits.title: Students develop purposeful agency and enduring self-direction
benefits.statement: Students can articulate what matters to them, explore uncertainty and make intentional choices. Regular reflection strengthens their ability to revise direction, connect knowledge with experience and continue shaping their lives, learning and contribution beyond King’s.
benefits.successLooksLike: Students can articulate and revisit their purposes, make intentional choices about their King’s experience and adapt their direction as their circumstances and ambitions change.

benefits.title: King’s creates a more coherent, equitable and responsive opportunity ecology
benefits.statement: Students can identify relevant opportunities and understand how experiences connect, with less reliance on confidence, networks or institutional knowledge. King’s can make more relevant recommendations and better-informed investment decisions, reducing inequality and fear of missing out while improving the reach, relevance and value of enrichment provision.
benefits.successLooksLike: Students from different backgrounds can identify opportunities relevant to their purposes, while decisions about enrichment provision draw on clearer patterns of student ambition, need and demand.
